title: Nachor #3493
definition:
Nahor = "snorting"

 1) was the name of two persons in the family of Abraham, an ancestor
    of Christ
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nahor = "snorting"

 1) was the name of two persons in the family of Abraham, an ancestor
    of Christ

    NASB:  Nahor, the grandfather of Abraham:
